nasb.text: The fierce anger of the Lord will not turn back Until He has performed and until He has accomplished The intent of His heart; In the latter days you will understand this.

esv.text: The fierce anger of the Lord will not turn back until he has executed and accomplished the intentions of his mind. In the latter days you will understand this.

cnv.text: 耶和華的烈怒必不轉消， 直到他作成和實現他心中的計劃。 在末後的日子， 你們就會明白這事。

ccb.text: 耶和华不完成祂心中的计划， 祂的烈怒必不止息。 将来有一天，你们会明白。
